why_recommended.zh: 用更明确的风格、颜色或材质分层承接用户的比较需求。
why_recommended.en: Uses clearer style, color, or material tiers to serve shoppers who compare options before buying.

evidence.zh: 用户更容易被明确场景、款式差异和组合价值吸引。
evidence.en: Users respond better to clear use cases, style differences, and bundle value.

risk_note.zh: 图片、标题和实际款式需要保持一致。
risk_note.en: Keep images, titles, and actual variants consistent.

product_name.zh: 玉米皮爆改鲜花礼品组合包
product_name.en: Corn Husk Flower DIY Gift Bundle

why_recommended.zh: 把单品包装成有场景的组合，更适合在节点和社交内容里转化。
why_recommended.en: Packages single items into an occasion-led bundle that converts better around seasonal moments and social content.

evidence.zh: 适合用短内容展示使用效果、搭配方式或送礼理由。
evidence.en: Short-form content can show the use effect, styling method, or gifting reason.

risk_note.zh: 控制库存和履约复杂度，先从少量组合测试。
risk_note.en: Control inventory and fulfillment complexity; start with a small set of bundles.

strategy.zh: 用三步验证：先选一个明确场景做主推，再准备不同价位的组合，最后用短内容测试点击、收藏和加购反馈。
strategy.en: Validate in three steps: lead with one clear scenario, prepare bundles across price tiers, then test clicks, saves, and add-to-cart signals with short-form content.
